cards.back: A morphological operation that reduces the size of an image by removing pixels based on the set size, used to remove noise and small objects
A morphological operation that increases the size of an image by adding pixels based on the set size, used to fill small holes and gaps
A composite operation that first erodes an image and then dilates it, used to remove small objects and details from an image
A composite operation that first dilates an image and then erodes it, used to restore details and fill small holes in an image
A morphological operation that uses a structuring element with specific features to extract objects of a specific shape or pattern
